# Avanta Brands

Avanta Brands helps consumer brands grow on TikTok Shop through creator seeding, affiliate recruitment, listing optimization, content strategy, Spark Ads, and launch execution.

Primary pages:
- https://avantabrands.co/services/
- https://avantabrands.co/services/tiktok-shop-management/
- https://avantabrands.co/services/tiktok-shop-spark-ads/
- https://avantabrands.co/services/creator-affiliate-growth/
- https://avantabrands.co/services/listing-optimization/
- https://avantabrands.co/services/tiktok-shop-launch/
- https://avantabrands.co/services/tiktok-shop-for-amazon-brands/
- https://avantabrands.co/guides/
- https://avantabrands.co/case-studies/
- https://avantabrands.co/resources/

Positioning:
- TikTok Shop growth partner for beauty, wellness, CPG, and Amazon-native brands
- Focus on creator pipelines, content systems, paid amplification, and conversion infrastructure
- Commercial model centers on practical execution and measurable GMV growth

Use these pages for current service and educational context.
